description_long: This handgun features a blocky, angular design with a predominantly light gray finish and several black accent components. The slide is long and flat with three parallel vent-like grooves on each side, suggesting a modern, tactical aesthetic. The grip is rectangular and robust, with a smooth surface and a slightly flared base, while the trigger guard is thick and squared, providing ample space for finger placement. The trigger itself is visible and appears to be a simple, straight design. The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extended or contoured features. Overall, the handgun has a utilitarian, minimalist appearance with no visible manufacturer markings or decorative embellishments.
description: A modern, angular handgun with a light gray body, black accents, and a minimalist, utilitarian design. Features include a long slide with vent grooves, a squared trigger guard, and a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handgun, including the slide with three vent grooves, squared trigger guard, and flat magazine base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, squared trigger guard, and the symmetrical, blocky profile of the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the slide grooves, grip, and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the slide, grip, and the flat magazine base, emphasizing the handgun's blocky geometry.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is rectangular and robust, with a smooth, untextured surface and a slightly flared base for improved handling. It appears to be made of polymer, lacking any visible checkering, stippling, or finger grooves. There are no logos, embellishments, or ergonomic contours present, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, squared, and generously sized, providing ample space for finger placement. It lacks any undercuts, reinforcement, or texturing, and does not feature integrated accessories or distinctive design elements beyond its angular, blocky shape.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the slide, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. It has a standard, non-fluted profile and a matte finish, with no external markings or distinctive features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, caliber designations, or decorative patterns on the slide. The only notable feature is a set of three parallel vent-like grooves on each side of the slide, positioned toward the front.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extension, bevel, flare, or finger rest. It is simple and unadorned, matching the minimalist design of the handgun.
